# MetaStrip

> MetaStrip is a free, client-side metadata removal tool for images, documents, audio, and video. It strips GPS coordinates, device identifiers, timestamps, and other hidden metadata from 14 file formats. Files never leave your device.

## Key Facts

- Website: https://metastrip.ai
- Pricing: Free web tool, paid API (coming soon)
- Processing: 100% client-side (browser-based), zero server uploads for images
- Quality: Zero quality loss — binary-level metadata surgery, no image re-encoding
- Formats (browser): JPEG, PNG, WebP
- Formats (CLI/npm/MCP): JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, SVG, PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, MP3, WAV, FLAC, MP4, MOV
- npm packages: @metastrip/core, @metastrip/cli, @metastrip/mcp-server
- License: MIT
- GitHub: https://github.com/ICXCNIKAanon/metastrip

## What MetaStrip Removes

- GPS coordinates (latitude, longitude, altitude)
- Device information (camera make/model, serial numbers, lens info)
- Timestamps (date taken, date modified, date digitized)
- Software information (editing software, processing history)
- Author/copyright information
- AI generation metadata (model, prompt, parameters)
- Embedded thumbnails (which can contain original GPS data)
- XMP and IPTC metadata

## Products

### Web Tool (metastrip.ai)
Free, no signup. Drag and drop an image to see all hidden metadata with a privacy risk score. One click to remove everything. Download the clean file instantly.

### CLI (@metastrip/cli)
```
npm install -g @metastrip/cli
metastrip inspect photo.jpg    # View metadata
metastrip clean photo.jpg      # Strip metadata
metastrip diff photo.jpg       # Preview changes
```

### MCP Server (@metastrip/mcp-server)
AI agent integration via Model Context Protocol. Four tools: strip_metadata, inspect_metadata, compare_metadata, batch_strip.

### npm Package (@metastrip/core)
```typescript
import { MetaStrip } from '@metastrip/core';
const ms = new MetaStrip();
const report = await ms.inspect('photo.jpg');
const result = await ms.strip('photo.jpg');
```

## Documentation

- Getting Started: https://metastrip.ai/docs
- CLI Reference: https://metastrip.ai/docs#cli
- MCP Server Setup: https://metastrip.ai/docs#mcp-server
- npm API: https://metastrip.ai/docs#npm
- Blog: https://metastrip.ai/blog
